Wall Members

Wall Class Methods Properties See Also

The Wall type exposes the following members.

Methods

NameDescription
ArePhasesModifiable
Returns true if the properties CreatedPhaseId and DemolishedPhaseId can be modified for this Element.
(Inherited from Element.)
Equals
Determines whether the specified Object is equal to the current Object.
(Inherited from Object.)

Properties

NameDescription
CrossSection
Obtain the Wall Cross-section for this wall.
Width
Get the overall thickness of the wall.
